title: euonymus javanicus var. coriaceus
intro: Euonymus javanicus var. coriaceus, also known as the Javan spindle tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the Javan spindle tree is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or internally to support overall health.
